steps.command: git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
steps.name: rebase-freshness-guard

steps.hint: Fix missing/broken workflow file references in docs/specs before push.
steps.name: workflow-reference-guard

steps.hint: Update changed specs to satisfy quality contract sections (acceptance, gaps, references).
steps.name: spec-quality-guard
steps.output_tail: OK: no changed feature spec files detected in git range

steps.hint: Commit evidence contract passed for CI-parity and worktree coverage validation.
steps.name: commit-evidence-guard
steps.output_tail:
$ python3 scripts/validate_commit_evidence.py --file docs/system_audit/commit_evidence_2026-03-03_endpoint-swr-singleflight-cache.json

OK: evidence validation passed for docs/system_audit/commit_evidence_2026-03-03_usage-automation-fast-snapshot-fallback.json

steps.hint: Review command output tail, fix root cause, and re-run this guard before push.
steps.name: runtime-drift-guard
steps.output_tail: OK: runtime drift within allowlist baseline

steps.hint: Address maintainability regressions or update baseline with explicit review evidence.
steps.name: maintainability-regression-guard
steps.output_tail:
